title: Specterium
description:
A mod themed off of Soul Remnants forged into Spirit Alloys, forged into Specterium Ingots, contains new foods, weapons, and a new set of progression-based advancements, be warned, Specterium is Post-Netherite.
(Specterium is pronounced "Speck-Tree-Um")
body:
# Specterium

Specterium is a mod centered around Soul Remnants, which are refined into Spirit Alloys and ultimately forged into Specterium Ingots. This powerful new material unlocks a range of post-Netherite weapons, tools, and armor.

The mod also introduces new Sculk-themed foods, unique soul-infused weapons, and a progression-based advancement system to guide players through its mechanics.

Beware: Specterium is not for the faint of heart—it surpasses Netherite in power and requires true mastery to wield.

(Pronounced "Speck-Tree-Um")

(Also includes: A couple of Quality of Life Recipes)

## Specterium Mod Features:

### Materials & Crafting:
- Soul Remnants – A key ingredient in crafting Specterium materials.
- Spirit Alloys – Intermediate refined material.
- Specterium Ingots – The ultimate soul-infused metal, surpassing Netherite.

### Blocks & Effects:
- Ectoplasm (liquid) - Applies "Ectoplagerised" effect.
- Ectoplagerised (Effect) - Gives Slowness and Darkness for the duration.
- Ritual Altar – used with Totems for summoning.
- Sculk Bricks & Soul Bricks – Decorative blocks.


### Items & Weapons:
- Pact Scrolls – Used for activating unique abilities.
- Scythes (there is a sculk one and a nether one) – New Weapons, soul-themed.
- Spectre’s Binding – Rarer, Harder to obtain Shield.
- Abyss-Bound, Hell bound Totems (and the Totem of Damned Souls) - Boss summons, used at Ritual Alter.
- Hell Fang & Abyss Fang – New Nether & Sculk dagger.
- Specterium Upgrade Templates - You'll have to find these out on your own :).
- (New) Music Disc - Hell's Comin' With Me by Poor Man's Poison. (Just wanted to put this banger of a song into Minecraft)
- Foods - More foods (and two new drinks) that alll apply different effects.

### Mechanics & Gameplay:
- Ritual System – Involves Right-clicking Totems on the Ritual Altar.
- Progression-Based Advancements – Guides you through the mod with subtle hints.
- Post-Netherite Gear – Stronger equipment surpassing netherite.

Please, for your own sanity, use JEI, it will improve the expirience.
(Also, I would Highly Appreciate if Someone made a Compatability mod for all the Weapons In Specterium so that they work with "Better Combat" [name idea: "Spectral Combat"], and if someone could make a Specterium and "Farmer's Delight" Compatability mod [name idea: Spectral Delight], I Would Really Appreciate it.)

Thanks!
Have a Great Time :)
_🃏🎴AxisTheJester🎴🃏_
